top_signals.title: French Inflation Unexpectedly Falls Back to ECB’s 2% Target
top_signals.summary: French inflation slowed for the first time since the Iran war broke out as energy costs fell, alleviating pressure on the European Central Bank to keep raising interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Critical SimpleHelp flaw exploited to deploy new stealer malware
top_signals.summary: Hackers are exploiting a recently disclosed critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-48558) in SimpleHelp to deploy Djinn Stealer, a previously undocumented cross-platform information stealer targeting Windows, macOS, and Linux. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agentic AI Has an Identity Problem and Attackers Know It
top_signals.summary: AI agents can access data, trigger workflows, and take action across enterprise systems. Token Security explains why governing these privileged identities is becoming essential for enterprise security. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
